candidate_summary: KOTEKAN-INTERLEAVE: two sub-decoders share attention trunk; sub-decoder A emits even positions, sub-decoder B emits odd positions; each half-rate; composite forms complete sequence; sparse per-channel + dense composite
rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL
scoring_method: independent re-scoring of kw/sem/func vs LLM-side prior art

results.title: Kotekan (source)
results.rationale: Source domain (gamelan); not LLM prior art.

results.title: DUET Disaggregated Hybrid Mamba-Transformer
results.rationale: Interleaves SSM + attention blocks. Same multi-channel/interleaving primitive applied at layer level; sem and func both >= 0.7.

results.title: MuxWise Prefill-Decode Multiplexing
results.rationale: Bubble-less multiplex of prefill/decode = interleaved-channel allocation primitive; sem and func both >= 0.7.

results.title: DUETSERVE Harmonize Prefill+Decode
results.rationale: Harmonized prefill+decode interleaved-channel serving primitive; sem and func both >= 0.7.

results.title: Nexus Intra-GPU Disaggregation
results.rationale: Intra-GPU disaggregation focuses on scheduling rather than positional-slot decoder split; both sem and func below 0.7.

results.title: Speculative Streaming Multi-Stream Attention
results.rationale: Multi-stream attention with frozen/shared base for chain decoding = direct twin of two sub-decoders sharing trunk; strongest match.

results.title: Parallel Decoder Transformer (PDT) Synchronized Streams
results.rationale: PDT performs model-internal parallel decoding via shared latent = same multi-channel + shared-trunk primitive.

results.title: vLLM Chunked-Prefill Interleaving Hybrid Micro-Batch
results.rationale: Chunked-prefill interleaving in hybrid micro-batch = positional-interleave primitive.

strongest_match.title: Speculative Streaming Multi-Stream Attention (EMNLP 2025)
strongest_match.reason: Direct twin: multi-stream attention with shared/frozen base for chain decoding mirrors two sub-decoders sharing attention trunk emitting interleaved tokens.

fail_reason: 6 distinct LLM-side prior-art hits at sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7 (DUET interleaved blocks, MuxWise multiplex, DUETSERVE harmonized prefill/decode, Speculative Streaming multi-stream, PDT parallel decoder, vLLM chunked-prefill interleaving). The shared-trunk + multi-channel/interleaved-decoding primitive is well-established; Speculative Streaming (EMNLP 2025) is a direct twin of the proposed mechanism. total_hits=6 >= 1 -> FAIL.
notes: Independent re-scoring matches 07_hit_miss.json exactly: same 6 hits, same misses (Wikipedia source, Nexus below threshold). No keyword forcing since candidate's compound terms (gamelan/polos/sangsih/even-odd slot) do not appear in LLM prior-art snippets.
